title_font_status: needs_seed — the source pairs a bold sans ('LUXURY') with a script accent (the type word); the vault has no script face, so the whole title is rendered in Libre Caslon Display (a luxury display serif) as a category-correct placeholder. The script flourish is not reproduced. Canva source font confirmation owed.
_note: #3 (Luxury Villa — PHOTO-DOMINANT: property photo fills the canvas, white title + description over a legibility scrim, a baked dark bottom bar with the stat row + website). Every text bbox measured from the rendered baked source. Editable <text>: the LUXURY {type} title, the description body, the 3-stat row, and the website. Stat ICONS (house=area, bed=beds, bath=baths) are baked art and stay — universally correct. Colours are role tokens (agency colour wheel). No invented facts: title type + stats are real; the description is generated from real facts (type/city); website is agency copy. Missing facts hide their slot.

text_slots.text:
This brand-new luxury villa offers everything
you need for a stylish, comfortable,
and convenient lifestyle.
